items.label: Library
items.name: Primitives
items.summary: Browse every Control UI primitive through the same live examples used in its documentation.

items.label: Library
items.name: AI components
items.summary: Explore composable surfaces for messages, input, activity, media, and agent workflows.

items.name: Overview
items.summary: An owned-source registry of primitives, agent surfaces, complete blocks, and swappable skins.

items.name: Get started
items.summary: Choose a skin, install a component or complete block, wire its CSS, and compose your application runtime.

items.name: shadcn compatibility
items.summary: shadcn registry, token, and ownership conventions without writing to components/ui.

items.name: Architecture
items.summary: Runtime ownership, skin layering, customization paths, and registry derivation.

items.name: Agent surface
items.summary: Inspect and install registry items through HTTP, shadcn manifests, static metadata, and machine-readable docs.

items.name: Theme accessibility
items.summary: Audit canonical theme colors plus rendered popup, badge, and active-tab states, then run the same checks from the CLI.

items.name: Theme AI builder
items.summary: Create a Control UI theme with Claude Code, Codex, or Mastra Code, then import and test it live.

items.name: Skinning Control UI
items.summary: Author complete token-driven Control UI skins with slots, adornments, motion controls, and one shared component source.

items.name: Refined
items.summary: Compact, calm starting skin with a complete Control UI token contract.

items.name: Windows XP
items.summary: Windows XP-inspired Luna tokens, bevels, and titlebar details.

items.name: Liquid metal
items.summary: Polished metal skin with a WebGL shader control surface.

items.name: Rig
items.summary: Brutalist skin with coral accents, squared corners, and dense typography.

items.name: Flat
items.summary: Neutral reset skin with square corners, no shadows, and instant motion.

items.name: Modern Apple
items.summary: Apple-inspired Liquid Glass skin: WebGL-refraction on floating surfaces, precise directional rims, transparent inputs, and continuous corners.

items.name: Cuicui
items.summary: Cuicui-inspired shell skin with fixed grain, a docked w-80 sidebar, a neutral main container, and the send-aurora anchored extension on ChatComposer (skin.config fills the chat-composer:send-layer anchor).

items.name: Linear
items.summary: Linear-inspired skin: indigo brand on a cool neutral ramp, a flat 13px chrome band, 4px radius, hairline borders instead of elevation, and pill-shaped filled actions.

items.name: CSS-first interactivity
items.summary: Model UI reactions with relational selectors, container/style queries, and native platform elements before adding React state, effects, or event handlers.

items.name: CSS-first motion & sizing
items.summary: Drive sizing, enter/exit motion, and scroll effects from CSS and native attributes — token-driven and progressively enhanced — instead of measuring and animating values in JavaScript.

items.name: Derive, do not duplicate
items.summary: Avoid second sources of truth in component props, hook parameters, and local state.

items.name: Remount state boundaries
items.summary: Reset state by changing component identity or loading boundaries, not by syncing with effects.

items.name: Explicit names instead of comments
items.summary: Encode intent in identifiers and extracted units so the code needs no explanatory comments.

items.name: One responsibility per file
items.summary: Split domain components and hooks before fetching, filtering, selection, and form state become entangled.

items.name: Keep input and output APIs narrow
items.summary: Split oversized prop, argument, and return-value APIs into cohesive responsibilities.

items.name: Do not query the DOM in React
items.summary: Keep element identity and collections in React instead of searching rendered markup.

items.name: Real stack tests
items.summary: Prefer tests that drive production hooks, clients, routing, and cache behavior with only the network mocked.

items.name: Test rendered output, not class names
items.summary: Prove visual behavior through computed styles, geometry, or browser output instead of Tailwind class strings.

items.name: Cohesive folders
items.summary: Keep every folder a short, readable table of contents by grouping loose files into named responsibilities.

items.name: Single source of truth
items.summary: Prevent shared facts from drifting by assigning each one a canonical owner.

items.name: Use existing components first
items.summary: Start from the local design system or registry primitive before creating a new styled element.

items.name: Token discipline
items.summary: Use established design tokens and local CSS variables before reaching for one-off values.

items.name: ClassName boundaries
items.summary: Use component APIs for intended variation instead of overriding design-system internals with className.

items.name: Tailwind v4 CSS configuration
items.summary: Configure Tailwind through CSS directives and tokens instead of adding new JavaScript config.

items.name: Tailwind v4 migration syntax
items.summary: Use v4 names and modifiers when replacing or reviewing v3-era Tailwind classes.

items.name: First-class utilities before custom CSS
items.summary: Prefer Tailwind v4's first-class utility families before arbitrary properties or handwritten CSS.

items.name: Variant-first styling
items.summary: Check Tailwind variants before adding handwritten selectors, style props, or React state for styling.

items.name: Tailwind v4 capabilities
items.summary: Reach for new v4 utilities before layout hacks, user-agent checks, or JavaScript measurement.

items.name: Tailwind v4 behavior & motion
items.summary: Account for v4 behavior changes around transforms, hover, default colors, variant order, spacing, and motion.

items.name: State continuity
items.summary: Show loading, empty, partial, success, and failure states in the same product language.

items.name: Provenance without noise
items.summary: Surface source, runtime, and ownership cues only where they help the user trust or act.

items.name: Dense but scannable
items.summary: Favor compact surfaces that support repeated work without flattening hierarchy.

items.name: Say it once
items.summary: Cut redundant AI-slop copy so labels, controls, and state carry the obvious meaning.

items.name: Skin authoring
items.summary: Author a skin as three files with strict roles — theme.css owns the complete token contract, skin.config restyles slots and declares DS choices, skin.css says only what classes cannot.

items.name: Extension authoring
items.summary: Author an extension as an optional installable layered on the library — root-mounted for cross-cutting anatomy-attached behavior, anchored for component-scoped fx activated from skin.config.

items.name: Registry-first DX
items.summary: Keep the registry manifest and installed source as the contract users can inspect.

items.name: Skin completeness
items.summary: Treat a skin as a complete source recipe, not a partial class override layer.

items.name: Control UI composition
items.summary: Keep blocks readable by composing public agent components, hooks, and slots explicitly.

items.name: Runtime-agnostic UI
items.summary: Keep core visual surfaces independent from model runners, stores, and transport lifecycles.

items.name: Compound components DX
items.summary: Expose named anatomy parts when users need to customize layout or actions.

items.name: Context vs props
items.summary: Reach for a compound-component context only when props cannot reach the part, and store intent in it, not styling.

items.name: ChatMessage
items.summary: Composable chat message with typed role, density, and tone state.

items.name: ChatComposer
items.summary: Prompt composer with controlled text, submit state, and trigger-menu support.

items.name: ChatComposerAttachment
items.summary: Composer attachment rail with file previews, upload progress, and removal.

items.name: UserAsk
items.summary: Keyboard-first agent question panel that temporarily replaces the chat composer inside its container.

items.name: TaskList
items.summary: Floating agent task progress pill above the composer that expands into the full task list.

items.name: AudioRecorder
items.summary: Voice recorder with realtime waveform, duration, cancel, and submit controls.

items.name: AudioVisualizer
items.summary: Levels-driven realtime audio visualizer offered in two usage versions - bars and line - sharing one export and one props contract.

items.name: DynamicNotification
items.summary: Dynamic Island-style AI notification pill with a thinking state that morphs into a reply bubble — token-driven surface, WebGL-enhanced backdrop blur, or real refractive liquid glass.

items.name: EnvironmentVariables
items.summary: Composable environment variable editor with .env upload, bulk paste, reveal controls, and submit helpers.

items.name: Activity
items.summary: Shared static and collapsible activity anatomy with bounded, scrollable detail content.

items.name: SourceBadge
items.summary: Linked source badge with an automatic same-origin favicon, derived hostname, and resilient fallback.

items.name: ActionBar
items.summary: Reusable hover actions for message and response controls.

items.name: InlineAttachment
items.summary: Inline file and media previews for chat turns.

items.name: MarkdownBlock
items.summary: Assistant markdown output rendered to prose, with a header and copy-source action.

items.name: CodeBlockEditor
items.summary: Editable code surface with Shiki highlighting and token-based light/dark themes.

items.name: ChatLayout
items.summary: Layout primitives for full chat threads, turns, and thoughts.

items.name: ThreadRail
items.summary: Conversation minimap for scanning and jumping between chat turns.

items.name: Button
items.summary: Accessible action button with size, variant, and semantic tone support.

items.name: Collapsible
items.summary: Accessible disclosure primitive with measured open and close motion.

items.name: Tabs
items.summary: Segmented navigation with a stable active indicator.

items.name: Sidebar
items.summary: Responsive app sidebar with collapse, mobile sheet, and keyboard toggle support.

items.name: Scroll area
items.summary: Scroll container with overlay scrollbars and edge fades.

items.name: Table of contents
items.summary: Sticky in-page navigation with scroll-spy range highlighting.

items.name: Stepper
items.summary: Static and interactive workflow steps with horizontal and vertical layouts.

items.name: Skeleton
items.summary: Loading placeholder with a token-driven shimmer.

items.name: Slider
items.summary: Single-value range control with branded and plain treatments.

items.name: Select
items.summary: Single-choice picker with a token-matched trigger and floating list.

items.name: DropdownMenu
items.summary: Dropdown menu for actions, resources, labels, separators, and submenus.

items.name: Context Menu
items.summary: Pointer-positioned right-click and long-press menu with nested actions and selection controls.

items.name: Toggle
items.summary: Pressed-state button and toggle group built on the Button surface.

items.name: Switch
items.summary: On/off control with token-driven track, thumb, and press motion.

items.name: Dialog
items.summary: Modal dialog for focused tasks, confirmations, and custom panels.

items.name: Popover
items.summary: Anchored floating panel for inline settings and contextual content.

items.name: Tooltip
items.summary: Hover or focus hint popup with Base UI positioning and Control UI tokens.

items.name: Drawer
items.summary: Swipeable edge panel for mobile sheets and off-canvas surfaces.

items.name: Responsive dialog
items.summary: Modal dialog on desktop that becomes a swipeable bottom drawer on mobile.

items.name: Toast
items.summary: Transient notifications with a callable toast API and single Toaster mount.

items.name: Input
items.summary: Text field primitive sized and styled to match other controls.

items.name: Input group
items.summary: Joined input wrapper for addons, icons, and focus-within rings.

items.name: Phone input
items.summary: International phone field with country search, E.164 values, and Zod validation helpers.

items.name: Command
items.summary: Command palette with token-matched dialog, input, and result rows.

items.name: Kbd
items.summary: Keyboard shortcut chip and chord group.

items.name: Checkbox
items.summary: Single checkbox control with checked and indeterminate states.

items.name: Radio group
items.summary: Single-choice radio set for plans, filters, and option lists.

items.name: Accordion
items.summary: Stacked disclosure rows with measured panel animation.

items.name: Avatar
items.summary: Profile image with initials fallback and composable overlapping groups.

items.name: Progress
items.summary: Determinate task progress with optional label and value rows.

items.name: Hover card
items.summary: Hover or focus preview panel for profiles, links, and contextual details.

items.name: Alert dialog
items.summary: Modal confirmation dialog for destructive or blocking decisions.

items.name: Menubar
items.summary: Desktop command bar with nested menus, shortcuts, and separators.

items.name: Navigation menu
items.summary: Site navigation menu with a shared animated viewport.

items.name: Field
items.summary: Form field wrapper for labels, descriptions, errors, and validity state.

items.name: Form
items.summary: Form wrapper that coordinates field validation and returned errors.

items.name: Native select
items.summary: Native select control styled to match the Control UI control family.

items.name: Textarea
items.summary: Multiline text field with CSS-first auto-growth.

items.name: Input OTP
items.summary: One-time-code field with grouped, focus-aware slots.

items.name: Combobox
items.summary: Searchable single-select with input and floating option list.

items.name: Alert
items.summary: Inline status panel for callouts, errors, and notices.

items.name: Badge
items.summary: Compact status, label, or count chip.

items.name: Card
items.summary: Content surface for panels, tiles, and settings groups.

items.name: Table
items.summary: Responsive data table for lists, comparisons, and structured records.

items.name: Aspect ratio
items.summary: CSS aspect-ratio wrapper for media and previews.

items.name: Button group
items.summary: Joined button group for toolbars, split actions, and segmented controls.

items.name: Empty
items.summary: Empty-state layout for blank lists, zero results, and new workspaces.

items.name: Item
items.summary: List row with media, content, and trailing actions.

items.name: Pagination
items.summary: Page navigation for long lists and result sets.

items.name: Spinner
items.summary: Accessible loading indicator for pending buttons, panels, and inline waits.

items.name: Meter
items.summary: Static range meter for quota, storage, score, or usage values.

items.name: Tree
items.summary: Accessible tree view with roving keyboard navigation, single/multi selection, and animated disclosure.

items.name: Checkbox Group
items.summary: Multi-select checkbox set with shared state and select-all support.

items.name: Autocomplete
items.summary: Free-text input with search-as-you-type suggestions.

items.name: Number Field
items.summary: Numeric input with stepper buttons and optional drag-to-change behavior.

items.name: Trigger Menu
items.summary: Caret-anchored command or mention menu for text editors.

items.name: Toolbar
items.summary: Roving-focus toolbar for editor controls and compact actions.

items.name: Dockable Panel
items.summary: Non-modal workspace panel that moves between two explicit edge slots with a mobile Drawer fallback.

items.name: Morphing Panel
items.summary: Accessible disclosure surface that morphs between explicit collapsed and expanded dimensions.

items.name: Color Picker
items.summary: Color input with picker UI, formats, presets, and contrast helpers.

items.name: Gradient Editor
items.summary: CSS gradient editor with draggable stops and live preview.

items.name: Resizable
items.summary: Accessible resizable panel groups and split layouts with keyboard support.

items.name: Calendar
items.summary: Date selection grid built on react-day-picker and themed through tokens.

items.name: Typography
items.summary: The token-driven type scale — one --text-* rung per size, named by role. Publish the utilities, not a component.

items.name: Code
items.summary: Shared code surface: Shiki-highlighted lines, gutter, clean copy, and virtualization for large files.

items.name: Code Diff
items.summary: Unified or split diff from a git patch or a before/after pair, with word-level intra-line highlighting.

items.name: Markdown
items.summary: Rendered agent markdown (GFM) whose code fences compose Code, and diff fences compose CodeDiff.

items.name: useChatMessage
items.summary: Typed role, density, and tone state for ChatMessage.

items.name: useChatComposer
items.summary: Controlled composer text and submit state.

items.name: useUserAsk
items.summary: Question/option registration, selection, freeform text, and keyboard flow for UserAsk.

items.name: useAudioRecorder
items.summary: Browser microphone recording state, waveform levels, and Blob completion.

items.name: useEnvironmentVariables
items.summary: Editable environment variable rows with .env parsing, upload, duplicate detection, and submit helpers.

items.name: useCopyToClipboard
items.summary: Copy-to-clipboard behavior with success state and fallback support.

items.name: cn
items.summary: Tailwind class-name merge helper.

items.name: skin
items.summary: Skin slot and adornment resolvers for the Control UI library.

items.name: contracts
items.summary: Shared prop and slot contracts for swappable skins.

items.name: serialize
items.summary: Bridge a rich editor doc to plain text (and structured mentions) and back — independent of any one component.

items.name: ControlEffects
items.summary: CSS-driven control effects (top-shine, ripple, hover-circle) that follow every control app-wide through the emitted anatomy — portalled surfaces included.

items.name: viewTransition
items.summary: Interrupt-safe driver for the browser View Transitions API: deferred finish, fast-click interruption, reduced-motion fallback.

items.name: SendAurora
items.summary: Anchored ChatComposer extension: a blurred aurora backdrop that sweeps up once per sent message — activated from skin.config via the chat-composer:send-layer anchor.

items.name: Chat
items.summary: Controlled chat shell that composes rendered turns and a provider-owned composer.

items.name: Theme toggle
items.summary: Controlled theme controls with a three-value switch, binary switch, cycle button, and dropdown.

items.name: Coding agent
items.summary: Desktop coding workspace with project tasks, a focused conversation, and a persistent controlled composer.

items.name: Settings
items.summary: Searchable multi-page settings shell with responsive navigation and accessible control groups.

items.name: File explorer
items.summary: Finder-inspired file browser with locations, search, resizable columns, breadcrumbs, and an item preview.
